div.p: Completion Queue Entry (one cache line shared by 4 CQEs)

text.tspan: // Buffer ID extraction (if provided buffers used)
// Buffer ID extraction (if provided buffers used)

div.p: Cache Line Sharing: Four CQEs (4 × 16 = 64 bytes) fit in one cache line. Harvesting CQEs sequentially has excellent cache locality.
Bytes successfully transferred (read: bytes read, write: bytes written)
End-of-file on read (connection closed by peer on socket)
-res is the errno value Example: res = -22 → EINVAL Use: strerror(-cqe->res)
Set when provided buffer was selected. Buffer ID in bits [31:16] (shift right by 16).
